phase: P0/P1 local closure after resolving the build/page-data blocker
selectedBecause: Batch143 exposed the current largest P0/P1 blocker: build/page-data proof could be mistaken as hanging when an interactive tool timeout killed the command. Batch144 makes guarded and raw build evidence fresh, current-run, and explicit, then requires raw Next build exit 0 for higher local P0/P1 closure claims.
scope: Require local evidence runner artifacts to have ok=true, status=pass, completed===total and every command status=pass before the report/board can count them as pass.
Make in-progress runner artifacts ok=false so timeout/interruption artifacts cannot be accepted by the report.
Remove the recursive local-evidence-report command from the runner; run the report after the runner completes for strict current-run proof.
Keep hosted/public rollout blocked until Node24, APP_URL hosted smoke and real visual evidence pass.
Do not add AI, payment, fake verified data, auto-public community or role self-selection.
Require a cleaned raw Next build diagnostic artifact with rawNextBuildExitCode=0 before higher local P0/P1 closure can be claimed.

localEvidenceGates.label: JSON/data validation through source registry and direct data command
Artifact hygiene evidence artifact
localEvidenceGates.note: Recommended before packaging/sharing ZIP; not required in npm-ci working tree because node_modules/.next may be present.

localEvidenceGates.label: Runtime preflight source evidence artifact
localEvidenceGates.note: Recommended before packaging/sharing ZIP; not required in npm-ci working tree because node_modules/.next may be present.

localEvidenceGates.label: Raw Next build diagnostic exit-zero proof
Auth/invite runtime smoke blocks role self-elevation

hostedStillRequired.reason: Node22 local proof does not replace Node24 CI/Vercel proof.
Local loopback smoke does not prove public hosted URL.
Template evidence is not real browser capture.

allowed: Local P0/P1 evidence is stronger only when all required local evidence gates pass and no present runner artifact is incomplete/running.
P1 source work can continue only inside existing guardrails after evidence integrity is clean.
Hosted/public rollout remains blocked until Node24, APP_URL and visual evidence are real.
blocked: Không nói hosted proof đã đóng nếu chỉ có Node22 local evidence.
Không thêm feature mới để che P0/P1 blocker.

localEvidenceRunnerPassRequires: every command has ok === true and status === pass
integrityRules.partialRunnerArtifact: ok=false, status=running while commands are still running
integrityRules.reportBehavior: present but incomplete recommended evidence becomes an integrity warning and blocks higherLocalP0P1ClaimAllowed
rawBuildPassRequires: next build reached route/page-data and exited 0
